results.check_summary: Odd and even subsequences are arithmetic progressions.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of odd terms increasing by 4 and even terms decreasing by 2.

results.check_summary: Differences are -3 between increasing jumps of 5, 8, 11, 14, then 17.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with periodic sparse jumps increasing by 3.

results.check_summary: Growing blocks have steps -6, -10, -14, -18, then -22; next block starts at 39.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial starts and increasingly negative arithmetic steps.

results.check_summary: Three phase streams each update by multiplier 12 with fixed phase bias.
Candidate polynomial continuation is the best-supported full-prefix fit.
results.rule_summary: Higher-order POLY extrapolation from finite differences.

results.check_summary: Four interleaved streams have phase increments advancing arithmetically.
Third finite differences are constant at -5.
Modular periodic continuation is weakly identified; candidate consensus is absent.
results.rule_summary: MODAFFINE continuation inferred from wrapped phase behavior.

results.check_summary: Odd transition differences continue -4,-10,...; even differences continue 2,-3,...
Three phase streams continue as arithmetic, quadratic, and alternating doubling patterns.
Multiplier is 2; odd-phase biases decrease by 6 and even-phase biases increase by 6.
results.rule_summary: Period-2 AFFINE recurrence with phase-varying arithmetic biases.
